questions.subject: pharmacology
questions.question: Sedatives question 1: Which effect is commonly associated with benzodiazepines?
options: Severe analgesia as the main effect
questions.explanation: Benzodiazepines commonly produce anxiolytic, sedative, hypnotic, anticonvulsant, and muscle-relaxant effects.
